title: Waiting for Evangelion3010
wikitext:
[]: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:39 am It's midnight in Japan, the forum is currently in spoiler lockdown and some of us, myself included, are just going to wait for an official release to see the movie. Current mood: Waiting for official announcements

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:41 am You've come so far. You can do it. I feel the official release outside Japan will be a lot sooner than a lot of us think.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:49 am Yeah I think that too, but I gotta admit that waiting was much easier when I had a concrete date on the calendar to look forward to.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by baldur » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:52 am Yeah... Seeing AVANT 1&2 has made me so hopelessly excited for the film that I can hardly contain it. I'm not entirely sure how I'm going to handle the wait for this film to release in good quality...

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Sun Mar 07, 2021 3:19 pm Do we know if Khara has any plans to release the movie on any streaming platforms internationally subtitles be damned?

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Blockio » Sun Mar 07, 2021 3:21 pm There are claims to that effect, but no exact date given and as always with these claims, grain of salt

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Mar 07, 2021 4:23 pm Mood update following the news of the leaked script

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Mar 07, 2021 4:54 pm ohshit. But it's moonspeak right? I'm not trusting my heart and soul to google translate, or even DeepL. this is eva so the smallest distinction might change all the meaning i mean the first showing is supposed to be around now, right? Plus there were tons of fake "leaks" for Q as well, including the ludicrous "Mari is an asushin lovechild from the future" one. I'm getting flashbacks to all the times dreamed that I'd seen the movie and it was bad. Please don't be bad. Be happy, be heartbreaking, be confusing, anything but bad...

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:04 pm I'm seeing the possible spoilers there, but only in one that I'm believing the rest of is very doubtful.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Sun Mar 07, 2021 5:36 pm Absolute mood. I'm trying to avoid as much as I can until some sort of Western release. I'm just so happy it's finally out over there.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Mar 08, 2021 6:55 am I'm just spending my time reading non-spoiler reviews and reactions, the film sounds incredible and apparently most screenings end with the audience giving the film a standing applause which is extremely rare in Japan. My God. My heart can't take this.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 7:21 am Yeah I've read impressions and they all say it's a fantastic closure full of "service" in all senses.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Mon Mar 08, 2021 7:49 am Blockio wrote: There are claims to that effect, but no exact date given and as always with these claims, grain of salt

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Mar 08, 2021 9:19 am Joseki wrote: Yeah I've read impressions and they all say it's a fantastic closure full of "service" in all senses.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 9:39 am I'm just a bit confused by the narrative I've seen of people being petty, angry and generally aggressive in the spoiler section of the forum. I've seen a spoiler free livestream earlier and the mentioned that spoilers were everywhere and how here the discussion was very toxic on Evageeks.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by JoelcrNeto » Mon Mar 08, 2021 9:52 am Oh, rly glad to see that ratings! As I saw the spoilers, what I can say is that people are judging without having the proper context. Even though I know a lot, I still need to watch it , and the spoilers are certainly not going to ruin my experience.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:10 am I've just listened to the full One Last Kiss. Nice song, I can see it fitting well the credits.

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by GhostlyOcam » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:18 am Weird, it's still region-locked on Spotify (at least in Indonesia?) but not on Deezer. Anyway, it's available to stream now! https://www.deezer.com/en/album/211303372

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Mon Mar 08, 2021 10:24 am They announced an Asuka version vinyl Summer 2021 I gotta buy this one too, I can't betray my waifu by buying the Rei vinyl only

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by bobgoesw00t » Mon Mar 08, 2021 11:27 am Joseki wrote: They announced an Asuka version vinyl Summer 2021 I gotta buy this one too, I can't betray my waifu by buying the Rei vinyl only
summary:
[]: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Joseki » Sun Mar 07, 2021 11:39 am It's midnight in Japan, the forum is currently in spoiler lockdown and some of us, myself included, are just going to wait for an official release to see the movie. Current mood: Waiting for official announcements

[]: Re: Waiting for Evangelion:3.0+1.0             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa &raquo
